title: The prompt that turns Claude into your senior engineer
post:
After months of trial and error, I found the prompt structure that makes Claude respond like a seasoned senior engineer — not just a smart chatbot.

It starts with context overload. Give it your entire codebase structure, your constraints, your team conventions. Then ask one focused question.

The key is the second message: "Now think like a senior engineer who has seen this pattern before. What are you concerned about?"

The difference in response quality is remarkable.

Save this and try it on your next architectural question.

What prompt techniques have worked best for you? Thoughts?
